texto: Chakravyuh mein ghusne se pehle,Before entering the circle of deceit,kaun tha mein aur kaisa tha, who I was, and what I was,yeh mujhe yaad hi na rahega. I would not remember.Chakravyuh mein ghusne ke baad, After entering the circle of deceit,mere aur chakravyuh ke beech, (there was) between me and the circle,sirf ek jaanleva nikat’ta thi, only a deathly intimacyiska mujhe pata hi na chalega. that I never realised.
explicacao: Citação de Dilip Chitre sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Chakravyuh mein ghusne se pehle,Before entering the circle of deceit,kaun tha mein aur kaisa tha,…” articula motivacao, inspirational-quotes, reflexao em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como luto e inspiracao.
